name: Moroccan Chicken Skewers W/Mediterranean Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breasts, boneless & skinless, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 package fresh baby carrots (approx. 1 lb.), diagonally halved
1 red bell pepper, cut into strips
1 green bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Thread chicken on skewers and place in a foil-lined broiler pan.
2. Mix honey, vinegar, cumin, and red pepper flakes; brush some glaze over both sides of the chicken.
3. Broil 2 inches from the heat for about 9 minutes, turning once and brushing with additional glaze and caramelized pan drippings 2 or 3 times.
4. In a skillet, heat olive oil until very hot. Add carrots and bell peppers; sauté, stirring often over high heat, for about 5 minutes or until crisp tender.
5. Add cilantro and garlic; cook 1 minute longer.
6. Serve platter of vegetables with skewers on top.
